description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with snipped edges, round neck with snipped edges, graphic print with a faded effect and snipped edged hem FitRegular Wash careMachine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron on reverse For the man who loves style and comfort, this T-shirt from provogue is the perfect buy. Made of pure cotton fabric, you are sure to stay fresh and comfortable all day, while the stylish snipped edges enhance your fashion statement. Team this tee with sportswear when on a fitness drive, or with jeans and sports shoes for a cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
